column13:
1. Set methods:
- preferred payment method as Payment_1
- preferred shipping method as Shipment_1
3. Click button Update __Pay attention: before applying the new checkout default the Cart should be empty or the procedure of checkout should be finished first. After applying Checkout default the Cart should fill in from the beginning__
4. Add several products to the cart
5. Open checkout page
6. Check the Shipping and Payment method
